query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person sits against a completely black background, appearing as a dark silhouette with faint white highlights tracing the edges of the head, shoulders, and forearms. A small text watermark is visible in the center of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person sits against a completely black background, rendered nearly invisible by extreme underexposure that buries the subject in crushed shadows. The figure appears as a dark silhouette with only faint white rim-light tracing the edges of the head, shoulders, and forearms, while all facial features, clothing texture, and environmental detail dissolve into total absence. The overwhelming darkness and isolated outline create an oppressive atmosphere of dread and unease.
